name: ArchON Note
description: Sticky notes on the canvas — click the icon to drop a note, drag to move, double-click to edit, pick from a 16-color palette and a serif/sans font toggle.
author: Surecom
longDescription:
# ArchON Note

Lightweight sticky-note layer for the ArchON canvas. Drop notes anywhere on the diagram, drag them around, resize them, pick a background color and a font, write text — all of it persists with the project and participates in global undo/redo.

## Highlights

- **One click = new note.** Press the plugin icon in the toolbar; a note appears in the viewport center.
- **State machine like a real sticky-note tool.** Single click selects (resize handles + delete + style popover appear). Double-click enters edit mode. Click outside deselects.
- **16-color palette + serif/sans font toggle.** Choose at any time from the styling popover next to the selected note.
- **Dynamic font sizing.** The font shrinks/grows automatically to fit the box, no manual sizing required.
- **First-class persistence.** Notes live in `installedPlugins.archon-note.pluginData` — saved with the project (JSON, Google Drive, localStorage), restored on load.
- **Full undo/redo.** Every add, delete, move, resize, color change and text edit is reversible via global Cmd+Z.
- **Respects view mode.** No mutations, drags, or new notes when the project is in view-only mode.
- **Respects drawing mode.** Notes dim and stop intercepting clicks while you're drawing on the canvas.

## Data shape

```
installedPlugins['archon-note'].pluginData = {
  notes: { [id]: { id, position, size, text, bgColor, fontFamily } },
  noteOrder: string[]   // last-on-top z-order
}
```

See `docs/DATA_MODEL.md` inside the plugin for the full schema and migration rules.
